releaseNotes: Fixed long-press on a real Fire TV/Firestick remote not working - holding OK/Center to add a Movie, TV Show, or Channel to favorites, or to set a reminder in the Guide, silently did nothing on actual remote hardware even though it worked fine with a mouse. Also fixed the TV Guide sometimes losing its entire 3-day listing if the provider's guide data got cut off partway through downloading - it now keeps whatever it received instead of discarding all of it.
